data.title: OpenAI's latest model sparks debate over computing power advantage; to be more widely released than Anthropic's rival model.
data.description: Sam Altman has hinted that a new product will have a wider release compared to a competitor's offering from Anthropic. Speculation suggests that this could be due to OpenAI possessing greater computational resources.

data.title: Aegis Consent: When Silence Becomes Coercion
data.description: Important information regarding consent, impairment, and safety is crucial for everyone to understand. A recent study on campus sexual assault revealed alarming statistics. The research indicated that a significant portion of assaults are carried out by individuals familiar to the victim, like a date or acquaintance. This highlights the need for increased awareness and education on the importance of consent and safety measures.

data.title: Inuvo Announces Nomination of Sanja Partalo to Board as Company Prioritizes IntentKey AI Commercial Integrations
data.description: A prominent adtech investor known for successfully expanding critical AI, data infrastructure, and media technologies has been selected as a nominee for a Board seat. This investor has a proven track record of scaling these foundational technologies in the industry. The nomination is a significant move that aligns with the increasing importance of incorporating advanced AI and data infrastructure within media platforms. This development signifies a strategic shift for the Board towards enhanced technology utilization.

data.title: AstraZeneca Prostate Drug Wins FDA Panel Backing As Breast Cancer Candidate Falters
data.description: The Oncologic Drugs Advisory Committee of the U.S. Food and Drug Administration has issued mixed recommendations for AstraZeneca Plc (NASDAQ: AZN). They have endorsed the company's prostate cancer treatment but did not support its breast cancer therapy. The committee voted 7-1, with one abstention, in favor of AstraZeneca's Truqap (capivasertib) in conjunction with abiraterone and androgen deprivation therapy for patients with PTEN-deficient metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer. This recommendation was based on results from the Phase 3 CAPItello-281 trial, demonstrating a 19% reduction in the risk of disease progression or death. The median radiographic progression-free survival also increased to 33.2 months compared to 25.7 months in the control group. This decision reflects a split outlook for AstraZeneca's oncology portfolio.

data.title: Infopro Digital Launches Global Risk & Markets Shows, Uniting Risk, Data, Technology and Compliance Leaders -- New York Edition at the Javits Center, September 23-24
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Infopro Digital unveiled its Risk & Markets Shows, a fresh global event lineup set to take place in London, New York, and Singapore. This series aims to mirror the growing interconnectivity of financial markets by bringing together senior members from various sectors.

data.title: G.L. Sayre Joins The Pete Store After 92 Years, Adding Philadelphia and Wilmington to Growing East Coast Network
data.description: A highly acclaimed Peterbilt dealership, The Pete Store, has recently acquired one of the oldest truck dealerships in the Mid-Atlantic region. With this expansion, The Pete Store further solidifies its presence in the area. Based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, the dealership has been recognized as the Peterbilt North American Dealer of the Year four times. This strategic move allows the company to increase its footprint in the market and strengthen its position as a leading player in the industry. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for The Pete Store as it continues to grow and serve customers in the region.

data.title: Green Cabbage Launches 'Harvest,' the Leading Agentic AI Platform to Drive Faster Decisions, Better Deals, and Smarter Spend
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in Pittsburgh, a renowned procurement intelligence company named Green Cabbage introduced Harvest, an innovative AI platform. This platform is designed to enhance organizational operations by providing increased speed, precision, and confidence. Harvest aims to facilitate smarter negotiations for businesses, ultimately leading to improved efficiency and decision-making processes.

data.title: Novo Nordisk's Ozempic® pill, the only FDA-approved oral peptide GLP-1 medication for adults with type 2 diabetes, soon to be available in the US
data.description: Ozempic®, a medication containing semaglutide, will now be offered in a pill form with updated formulation and branding. This oral GLP-1 medicine is the sole approved option for reducing primary and secondary cardiovascular risks in adults, including risks of heart attack, stroke, and death.

data.title: Sonire Therapeutics Initiates First U.S. Clinical Study of Ultrasound-Guided HIFU Therapy for Pancreatic Cancer
data.description: Sonire Therapeutics, a leading medical device company based in Palo Alto, California, has officially commenced their U.S. clinical development with the SUNRISE-II feasibility trial. The trial aims to advance a minimally invasive treatment approach that is anesthesia-free. This significant milestone marks the company's entrance into the U.S. market, showcasing their dedication to innovative healthcare solutions. The announcement was made on May 1, 2026, with the company taking a major step forward in transforming medical practices.

data.title: Carter’s, Inc. Appoints Brand and Retail Veteran Sharon Price John as Chief Executive Officer and President
data.description: In Atlanta, the leading baby and children's apparel company in North America, Carter’s, Inc. (NYSE:CRI), revealed the naming of Sharon Price John as Chief Executive Officer and President, starting June 15, 2026. Ms. John will also join the Carter’s Board of Directors concurrently. Richard F. Westenberger will take on the role of interim Chief Executive Officer and President in the meantime.

data.title: Fed officials express inflation worries in defending dissenting opinions at the divisive meeting this week. Trump’s nominee may face opposition pushing for significant interest rate cuts.
data.description: This week's Federal Reserve meeting was one of the most contentious in years, indicating that President Trump's nominee for Fed Chair may encounter resistance in pushing for significantly reduced interest rates.

data.title: The ONE Group Hospitality, Inc. to Host First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast at 4:30 PM ET on May 6, 2026
data.description: In Denver, The ONE Group Hospitality, Inc., known as “The ONE Group” (Nasdaq: STKS), revealed that Emanuel “Manny” Hilario, the President and CEO, along with Nicole Thaung, the CFO, will lead a conference call and webcast to review the financial outcomes of the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 4:30 PM ET. The official report for the first quarter of 2026 will be published post-market closure on the same day.

data.title: Energea Finances Start of Construction at 140 MW Iron Spur Solar Project in Texas
data.description: Energea, a prominent renewable energy developer, has commenced construction on the Iron Spur Solar project in Snyder, Texas. This utility-scale solar power installation boasts a capacity of 140 MW DC and is anticipated to be fully operational by early 2029. Energea facilitated the financing for this venture, showcasing their commitment to sustainable energy initiatives. Notably, Iron Spur Solar has finalized an exclusivity agreement with an investment-grade corporate energy consumer for a prolonged Power Purchase Agreement. This strategic partnership underscores the project's viability and contribution to the renewable energy sector.

data.title: Centuri Holdings, Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6th, 2026
data.description: Centuri Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CTRI), a prominent utility and energy infrastructure services company based in North America, is set to release its first quarter results for 2026 on May 6th. Following this, the Company will conduct an earnings conference call on May 7th at 10:00 AM ET / 7:00 AM PT to delve into the financial outcomes and key business updates. This call will provide insights into Centuri's performance in the long run.
